## Description

**Point Pilot** is a travel-rewards companion that helps frequent flyers turn their
loyalty points into the best possible flights. You track your point balances across
programs (Amex Membership Rewards, Air Canada Aeroplan, and more), and then let our AI
advisor tell you exactly how to spend them.

The app pairs a personal points dashboard with an AI award-travel expert that treats your
real balances as ground truth and recommends the highest-value way to book any route.
Built with Vite + React + TypeScript, it persists your profile and chat locally — no
backend or database required.

**Signature detail:** Point Pilot answers a booking request ("YYZ → Tokyo in business,
next spring") with a ranked set of award strategies computed against *your* actual
balances — which program to book through, the points required, the transfer path
(e.g. Amex MR → Aeroplan at 1:1), the taxes/fees and cents-per-point value of each option,
and explicit warnings about transfer irreversibility, fuel surcharges, and availability.
Instead of a static balance, you get an actionable, personalized redemption plan.
